acceptance_criteria:
1. extract_field correctly parses marker protocol
2. jsonish used for parsing each field
3. Constraint evaluation via run_user_checks
4. Assert failures become ParseError::AssertFailed
5. Check failures recorded in FieldMeta only
6. ParseError::Multiple collects all errors
7. Partial results preserved on error
8. Returns (S::Output, IndexMap) on success
title: Add typed response parsing with jsonish and constraint evaluation

acceptance_criteria:
1. Predict<S> struct compiles
2. new() returns Predict<S>
3. builder() returns PredictBuilder<S>
4. Builder methods chainable
5. build() returns configured Predict<S>
title: Define Predict<S> struct and builder

description: [DSRs: crates/dspy-rs/Cargo.toml] Ensure rlm feature enables pyo3, rlm-core, rlm-derive, baml-bridge/pyo3.

notes.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local
notes.content:
Plan (Task 6.0): enable `rlm` feature in `crates/dspy-rs/Cargo.toml` (and rig-rlm if separate).
- `rlm` feature pulls in `rlm-core`, `rlm-derive`, `pyo3`, `baml-bridge/pyo3`.
- `lib.rs` re-exports `rlm_core` + `rlm_derive` under feature gate.

title: Task 6.0: Enable rlm feature on dspy-rs
